mapper.sql: id, fund_asset_id, fund_code, fund_name, buy_status, daily_purchase_limit, returns_as_of, top_holdings_as_of, public_holdings_status, one_month_return, three_months_return, six_months_return, one_year_return, three_years_return, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fund_detail_item ( fund_asset_id, fund_code, fund_name, buy_status, daily_purchase_limit, returns_as_of, top_holdings_as_of, public_holdings_status, one_month_return, three_months_return, six_months_return, one_year_return, three_years_return ) VALUES ( #{fundAssetId}, #{fundCode}, #{fundName}, #{buyStatus}, #{dailyPurchaseLimit}, #{returnsAsOf}, #{topHoldingsAsOf}, #{publicHoldingsStatus}, #{oneMonthReturn}, #{threeMonthsReturn}, #{sixMonthsReturn}, #{oneYearReturn}, #{threeYearsReturn} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), fund_asset_id = VALUES(fund_asset_id), fund_name = VALUES(fund_name), buy_status = VALUES(buy_status), daily_purchase_limit = VALUES(daily_purchase_limit), returns_as_of = VALUES(returns_as_of), top_holdings_as_of = VALUES(top_holdings_as_of), public_holdings_status = VALUES(public_holdings_status), one_month_return = VALUES(one_month_return), three_months_return = VALUES(three_months_return), six_months_return = VALUES(six_months_return), one_year_return = VALUES(one_year_return), three_years_return = VALUES(three_years_return), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fund_detail_item WHERE id > #{lastId} AND fund_code IS NOT NULL AND fund_code != '' ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
